ordinate.error: APIs return True/None but create zero dimensions out-of-process
ordinate.characterization: Ordinate dimensions require a datum vertex selection (the 0.0 origin) before AddOrdinateDimension can create actual dims. Out-of-process COM cannot select vertices in drawing views - SelectByID2 returns False, GetVisibleEntities raises type mismatch. APIs marshal without exception and return True, but produce zero effect because the prerequisite selection cannot be performed programmatically.

baseline.error: APIs exist but require selection workflow not accessible out-of-process
baseline.characterization: Baseline dimensions (InsertBaseDim/InsertChainDim) also require a selection workflow - a dimension must be selected first as the base datum. All methods return None without creating dims. Same selection-workflow wall as ordinate.

shared_wall_characterization.pattern: Same wall as rib/wrap/loft/boundary-boss - APIs exist, marshal without exception, but produce no effect because prerequisite geometry selection cannot be performed out-of-process
shared_wall_characterization.resolution: Would require Route-C (in-process) or VBA-emit-and-run per the Wave-7 architectural ruling - rejected as it would relax Invariant #3 (zero arbitrary code execution)

view_verification.note: Even InsertModelAnnotations3 created 0 dims because test part was built without model dimensions in sketch

deferred_md_update: docs/DEFERRED.md Wave-31 row added; drawing-generation row updated with 'ordinate/baseline dim types (W31 NO-GO)' in deferred list
